content.thinking:
The user wants to know what WordPress version is running on "jppblank". The skill instructions say to use nexus wp commands for WordPress management tasks on local sites. Let me use the nexus CLI to check the WordPress version for jppblank.

I'll run `wp core version` on jppblank using the nexus CLI.

content.content:
Usage: nexus wp [options] [command]

Run WP-CLI commands on sites

Options:
  -h, --help                    display help for command

Commands:
  user-list [options] <target>  List WordPress users
  option-get <target> <key>     Get WordPress option value
  health [options] <target>     Check site health
  plugin                        Manage WordPress plugins
  theme                         Manage WordPress themes
  core                          Manage WordPress core
  db                            Manage WordPress database
  post                          Manage WordPress posts
  help [command]                display help for command
